previous_requests.resolution: Blocked count now 0 (was 2). Quarantine grew from 16 to 203. Root cause: unknown-origin messages lacking required fields were NACKed by archivist, then the NACKs themselves were routed to quarantine by lane-worker requiring confidence rating. Safe to archive bulk NACK-of-NACK files.
